titleStmt.title: SII 30.235: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 235. (A.R. No. 586 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sakaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha temple-on the south wall of the mukha-maṇḍapa Mār. Kulasēkhara-Pāṇḍya ‘who was pleased to take all the countries’: Year 12 Simha, 14, su.di. 3, Friday, uttara: 1279 A.D. Aug. 11

summary.p: It records the sale of land by army people, (paḍaikkārāychi cheyvār) of Ārinādu to certain Pirān Kāliṅgarāyan alias Vēṇavuḍaiyār of Kaḷattāvūr in Sevvirukkaināḍu for 100 paṇam. The irrigation channel to that land had been restored as before. Several persons figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmeykkirttikkumel śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 10 2 vatu simhanāyaṟṟu 10 4 tiyatiyum pūrvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum veḷḷik kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ Ārināṭṭu malaiyaṭikkuṟiccip paṭaikkārāycci ceyvārkaḷom cevvirukkai nāṭṭuk kaḷattūr
ka nallūr kaḷattāvūruṭaiyāṉ pirāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉāṉa veṇāvuṭaiyārkku vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷ civitamāṉāparaṇa Uṭaiyār ṟuttaruḷa mar marumakaṉ viranārāyaṇa tevar pakkal vilai Ivaṟkkuk kārāṇmai paḷḷam
pa maikku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta Orukku �kkilc coṉṉāṟṟaṅkūṉimaṭaiyāṟ ponta nā ppaṟṟukkup paṇṭāṭupaḻanaṭai pāynta kavaroḻiya rupo maṭaiyorukkukkup pāyvatākavum Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta yorukku nirukku Emmilicainta vilai niśvayitta paṇam 100 Ippaṇam nūṟum Eṅkaḷūrkku nāṟpatte
� ṉ vātatevar tevar Uṭaiyār ka kūṟu Uṭaiyār veṇāvuṭaiya perumāḷukkup piṟitta paṇattukku Ivarkkup paṭai Aracu nāmattukkum colvallapāṇṭi Arupa Āṉa ppaṭikkuk kuṭuppittu Ippaṟṟukkum paṇṭāṭupaḻanaṭai pāyntu potukiṟa kavaroḻiya Eṭṭu nāḷaiville
5 poḻutu maṭaiyorukkākap pāyvatāka viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom paṭaikkārāycci ceyvārkaḷom veṇāvuṭaiyārkku 2 Ivai ceṉaimikāmap pallavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ca Ārināṭāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai yaḻakiya pāṇṭiya Ārināṭāḷvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cuntara pāṇṭiya Āri nāṭāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai teven
tirapporāpati nāṭāḷvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vikkirama pāṇṭiya Ārināṭāḷvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ārināṭāḷvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai muṉaiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai taṉañceya pallavataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tamiḻataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭiya taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai paṭaikkaṇakku maṇalūruṭaiyāṉ Aracāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 30.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
